/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -stdlib=libc++ -O2 -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 12.0.0 -current_version 12.0.1 -o libarmadillo.12.0.1.dylib -install_name @rpath/libarmadillo.12.dylib CMakeFiles/armadillo.dir/src/wrapper1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/armadillo.dir/src/wrapper2.cpp.o  -framework Accelerate /opt/homebrew/lib/libarpack.dylib
